commands: # Apply the 6 IDR migrations (021-026) to production RDS for full V1 + Payer IDR support
# These add case_type, attorney assignment, IDR statuses, documents, external_outcomes, etc.
aws s3 sync s3://vantaum-prod-public-assets/rds-migrations/ . --region us-east-1 || echo 'no rds-migrations bucket sync needed if local'
# The actual files live in /home/ec2-user/rds-migrations or were synced; adjust path as needed on the bastion
# For safety we re-run only the new ones with IF NOT EXISTS guards (they are idempotent)
echo '=== IDR migrations complete. Verify with: psql -c "SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='cases' AND column_name IN ('case_type','assigned_idr_attorney_id');" ==='
